title: SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Splits Schema v0.1
description: Schema for validating splits.json in the SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Track synthetic/sample package. This schema is for public helper use only. It does not define CAIS, does not define Sal-Meter, does not grant compliance, does not validate benchmark performance, and does not create diagnostic, therapeutic, clinical, surveillance, employment, insurance, educational, legal, or eligibility authority.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this split definition structure.

dataset_type.description: Dataset class. Public sample data must be synthetic or structure-demo only.

split_file_role.description: Role of this split file. Current public package is structure demonstration only.

split_strategy.description: Declared split strategy. The current synthetic package uses a structure-only session holdout demonstration.

raw_human_data_present.description: Public synthetic/sample split files must not contain raw human data.

splits.description: Train, validation, and test session assignments. In the current synthetic package this demonstrates structure only and must not be treated as benchmark evidence.

test.description: Synthetic test session identifiers. Empty test arrays are allowed in structure-demo files.

holdout_flags.description: Optional explicit holdout flags for future non-public benchmark planning. These flags do not validate benchmark performance.

leakage_notes.description: Leakage and split-boundary notes. These notes must make clear that synthetic split examples are not benchmark evidence.

boundary.description: Final boundary statement. Must state that the split file is synthetic/sample only and not benchmark evidence, not Sal-Meter validation, and not CAIS compliance.

public_release_status.description: Optional public release status for this split file.

sal_meter_input_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. Current proxy sample split files must not contain Sal-Meter input data.

cais_compliance_claim_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. Public helper files must not contain CAIS compliance claims.
